title: bouvardia costaricensis
intro: Bouvardia costaricensis, also known as Costa Rican bouvardia, is a flowering plant in the Rubiaceae family, native to Central America. It is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antispasmodic effects, making it useful in treating various health conditions. The health benefits of Bouvardia costaricensis include relieving menstrual cramps, reducing fever, and soothing respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma. The plant is often used in herbal preparations, including teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
